channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Rising to the occasion, Shohei Ohtani hits 2-run HR in return to Japan against Yomiuri Giants
item.description: TOKYO (AP) — Japanese star Shohei Ohtani showed off some prodigious power in his return to the Tokyo Dome on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Clemson gets locked out of locker room in ACC semifinal; lose narrowly to Louisville
item.description: The Clemson Tigers were forced to gear up for the last 20 minutes of their ACC semifinal game from the halls of Spectrum Center after their locker room was locked.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Mitty grad Yorke hopes solid 2024 Pirates debut leads to Opening Day roster spot
item.description: The Pirates are trying Yorke at multiple positions, possibly opening up more opportunities for him to make the big-league club sooner than later.
item.dc:creator: David Driver, The Mercury News

item.title: Dodgers' Betts dealing with illness in Japan, Roberts hopeful he'll be ready for opening day
item.description: Shortstop Mookie Betts will miss the Los Angeles Dodgers’ two exhibition games in Japan because of an illness.
item.dc:creator: David Brandt, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Lewis Hamilton 8th in qualifying in Ferrari debut as Norris takes pole for F1 race in Australia
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — McLaren locked up the front row in Melbourne for Sunday’s Australian Grand Prix, having dominated its rivals, including Red Bull, Mercedes, and Ferrari — whose drivers, Charles Leclerc and Lewis Hamilton, will start from seventh and eighth on the grid.
item.dc:creator: STEWART BELL, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Withers' lane violation adds improbable twist to UNC's failed comeback against No. 1 Duke in ACCs
item.description: CHARLOTTE, N.C. (AP) — Jae'Lyn Withers stood in a hallway of the Spectrum Center, his left arm resting around the shoulders of North Carolina coach Hubert Davis. He was surrounded by reporters, all wanting to know a simple question.
item.dc:creator: AARON BEARD, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Plucky Lakers nearly beat Nuggets despite Luka Doncic, LeBron James among LA's sidelined starters
item.description: DENVER (AP) — Luka Doncic sat out the Los Angeles Lakers' 131-126 loss at Denver on Friday night, cheering on his scrappy, short-handed teammates who nearly pulled off a shocker without four starters.
item.dc:creator: ARNIE STAPLETON, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Maine's federal funding freeze from Trump's USDA reversed
item.description: The federal funding freeze against Maine imposed by President Donald Trump's Department of Agriculture during Title IX and Title VI investigations has been reversed.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Stephen Curry becomes first player in NBA history to make 4,000 3-pointers
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Stephen Curry's shooting range and accuracy from way back have long stood alone — whether with a defender or two in his face or when letting it fly from the logo.
item.dc:creator: JANIE McCAULEY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bubble watch: Indiana and Xavier now feeling the heat with Texas and North Carolina closing strong
item.description: A look at the NCAA Tournament bubble picture: Missed opportunities Xavier and Indiana had chances to give their resumes a significant boost Thursday, but the Musketeers lost 89-87 to No. 25 Marquette, and Indiana fell 72-59 to No. 23 Oregon.
item.dc:creator: NOAH TRISTER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Lakers' James, Hachimura, Hayes fly back to California for treatment and will miss rest of road trip
item.description: MILWAUKEE (AP) — LeBron James flew back to California for treatment on his left groin strain and will miss the rest of the Los Angeles Lakers’ four-game trip, which concludes Friday at Denver.
item.dc:creator: STEVE MEGARGEE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: San Diego St. women beat Wyoming in triple OT for MWC title
item.description: Veronica Sheffey scored 24 points and Cali Clark recorded a double-double and fourth-seeded San Diego State clinched the automatic bid to the NCAA Tournament beating No. 2 seed Wyoming 72-68 in triple overtime of the Mountain West Conference Tournament on Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Boys Lacrosse: La Jolla Country Day 17, Rancho Bernardo 4
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)-Boys Lacrosse in the north county on Tuesday evening with La Jolla Country Day beating Rancho Bernardo 17-4.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: Warriors' Steph Curry becomes investor in Unrivaled Basketball
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- Stephen Curry has joined Unrivaled basketball as an investor. The Golden State Warriors guard is the latest sports star to join the 3v3 basketball league as an investor, joining the likes of the NBA's Giannis Antetokounmpo and Carmelo Anthony, and tennis star Coco Gauff.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, KRON4

item.title: RSL gives up two stoppage time goals in 3-1 loss
item.description: SANDY, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - After jumping out to an early lead, Real Salt Lake allowed three straight goals, two in stoppage time, and loses in its first meeting with San Diego FC Saturday night at America First Field, 3-1.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Aggies dominate Air Force in regular season finale
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Mason Falslev scored 18 points on 8-of-10 shooting to lead the Utah State basketball team to a dominating 87-47 win over Air Force. The Aggies had lost two in a row for the first time all year, but gave their fans plenty to cheer about in their home finale.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utes win another NCAA skiing national title
item.description: HANOVER, N.H. (ABC4 Sports) - The University of Utah returned to the pinnacle of the collegiate skiing world on Saturday as the Utes won their 17th national title all-time—and fifth in the last six seasons—with the conclusion of the 2025 NCAA Championships.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Real Salt Lake aims to keep winning as San Diego FC visits for the first time
item.description: Real Salt Lake returns to action at America First Field on Saturday night, facing MLS expansion side San Diego FC for the first time. Coming off a commanding 2-0 win over Seattle last weekend, RSL looks to build momentum and keep their shutout streak alive in front of their raucous home crowd.
item.dc:creator: Matthew Casey, ABC 4
